stemHtml: How would a controller ask you to reselect mode and code on the transponder?

options.a: G-ACZG, RESET SQUAWK ALFA THREE SIX ONE SIX.
options.b: G-ACZG, SQUAWK IDENT THREE SIX ONE SIX.
options.c: G-ACZG, TURN ALFA THREE SIX ONE SIX.
options.d: G-ACZG, RESELECT SQUAWK ALFA THREE SIX ONE SIX.
